title: Cannot restart rootless container with pasta published ports
body:
### Issue Description

When running a container with pasta published ports, restarting the container will raise an address in use error.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

- Run `podman run --network=pasta -d -p 8000:80 docker.io/nginx:stable`
- Restart the container using `podman restart`

### Describe the results you received

```
Error: pasta failed with exit code 1:
Failed to bind port 8000 (Address already in use) for option '-t 8000-8000:80-80', exiting
```

### Describe the results you expected

However, restart should succeed.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

N/A

### Additional information

This issue makes `restart=always` not work with `timeout`.
